query: i'm rebuilding the interview screen and it currently looks like a chat — bubbles down the page with a text box at the bottom. how should it actually be laid out so it reads like one of our instrument panels instead?
where does the coverage/confidence readout go — can i just put the textarea for the user's answer right inside that dark monitor box next to the meter?
for the layout inside this Cell, do i use flex/gap tailwind classes or should i write scoped css? and what do i use for the button itself — nc-btn or a tailwind-styled button?
i've got a diagram showing the request going to the LLM provider. should that sit on a normal white panel or somewhere else, and what color should the linework be?
naming check: this component is the row of nav buttons at the top of the chassis. what do i call it — NavBar? NavigationBand? does the suffix matter?
review this InterviewPage.vue for me — does it actually conform to the Lab look? it's a bunch of divs with box-shadows and a big uniform 3-column grid
the progress bar on my synthesis step just animates 0→100 on a timer because the real call doesn't report progress. is that ok or is it against the 'no fake meters' thing?
make this settings page stop looking like a generic SaaS dashboard with the metric cards and sparklines — i want it to feel like the rest of the app
is the acquiring/analyzing waveform the right thing to show while the model is generating, or should that be a quiet indicator? the user is waiting on this exact result
we want to start a flutter port of mirror. how do i build the interview screen as an instrument in flutter — what are the widget equivalents of your cells and monitors?
my InterviewPage.vue builds the llm client inline, orchestrates four calls, mutates the persona model, and catches errors with try/return. how do i split this across the layers?
where should the transform between my domain model and the indexeddb DTO live — the store is doing the mapping itself right now
my usePersonaStore is a plain function returning refs instead of a defineStore. how do i make it a real pinia store?
i want to shift the whole theme toward a warm gold. which seed channels do i change and how does the hsl/calc derivation work for the surface ramp?
this candy-pink seed is failing WCAG AA on the body text. how does the contrast auto-adjuster compute the foreground lightness?
the coverage meter flex row overflows and wraps under 640px on my phone. how do i fix the responsive breakpoint so it doesn't break?
write me the marketing tagline and the about-page copy explaining our privacy stance for the landing site
what's the difference between ref and reactive in vue 3 and when do i reach for each in a script setup component?
how do i register the Lab plugin and import the stylesheet in main.ts for a fresh vite project?
should i use opus or sonnet for the synthesis call and how do i cut the token cost per run?
